problem.name: Random_Pet_Baseline
problem.description:
Random recommender baseline for the Pet domain. This is a non-learned lower-bound: prediction scores are random (popularity-weighted). There is no training; each epoch re-runs evaluation with the RNG advanced.

Hardware / Runtime Requirements:
- CPU or GPU. Minimal resource usage.

Model Architecture:
- RandomRecommender: scores are uniform random draws multiplied by item-frequency^(1/temperature).
- Strategy: popularity, pop_temperature=1.0.

Acceptance Checklist:
- Runs without errors.
- Provides baseline HR@5/NDCG@5 metrics for comparison.

重要约束：纯序列化建模，仅使用用户交互序列（item IDs），不可以加入文本嵌入（text embedding）、图像特征、评论内容等任何外部模态信息。只允许使用序列中的 item ID 进行建模。

initial_idea.title: Random Recommender Baseline for Pet
initial_idea.content: A non-learned random recommender baseline. Scores are random draws, optionally weighted by item popularity. Serves as a lower-bound for comparing learned models (HSTU, SASRec, etc.).
